system_principles.completion_rate_optimization: Maintain 7 slides for story structure to optimize viewer dwell time.
system_principles.primary_metric_focus: Sends (DM shares) and Saves. Like count is secondary.
system_principles.alt_text_rules: Always write semantic alt text for target user categorization by the algorithm.

content_formulas.give_to_ask_ratio: 3:1 (Three empathy/story cards to one action/sales prompt)
content_formulas.first_card_hook: Negative instinct stimulation or loss avoidance copy only.

visual_specifications.contrast_ratio: High contrast text over darkened background overlay
